# Spec: generate-sbom.md §`generate components` Command
# Covers: JSON scaffold, CSV scaffold, positional path, -o, --force, overwrite refusal,
# --describe, --schema.

# --- Default JSON scaffold in cwd ---
exec sbomasm generate components
exists .components.json
exec jq -e '.schema == "interlynk/component-manifest/v1"' .components.json
exec jq -e '.components | length == 1' .components.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].name == "libexample"' .components.json

# --- Refuse to overwrite ---
! exec sbomasm generate components
stderr 'refusing to overwrite'

# --- --force overwrite ---
exec sbomasm generate components --force
exists .components.json

# --- CSV scaffold ---
rm .components.json
exec sbomasm generate components --csv
exists .components.csv
grep 'interlynk/component-manifest/v1' .components.csv
grep 'libexample' .components.csv

# --- Positional path as directory ---
mkdir sub
exec sbomasm generate components sub
exists sub/.components.json

# --- Positional path as explicit file ---
exec sbomasm generate components my-deps.json
exists my-deps.json
exec jq -e '.schema == "interlynk/component-manifest/v1"' my-deps.json

# --- --describe prints field reference ---
exec sbomasm generate components --describe
stdout 'Component manifest'
stdout 'schema: interlynk/component-manifest/v1'
stdout 'name '
stdout 'version'
stdout 'hashes'
stdout 'pedigree'

# --- --schema to stdout ---
exec sbomasm generate components --schema
stdout '\$schema'
stdout 'interlynk/component-manifest'

# --- --schema to file ---
exec sbomasm generate components --schema -o schema.json
exists schema.json
exec jq -e 'has("$schema")' schema.json

# --- --describe and --schema mutually exclusive ---
! exec sbomasm generate components --describe --schema
stderr 'mutually exclusive'
